code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Bool
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  when None
    false
  end
end

fn count_token(_ s: String, _ target: String) -> Int
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    while i < n and is_ws(s, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      let start = i
      while i < n and not is_ws(s, i)
        i = i + 1
      end
      let stop = i
      let tok = string.substring(s, start, stop)
      if tok == target
        count = count + 1
      end
    end
  end
  count
end

fn first_pos(_ s: String, _ target: String) -> Int
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut result = -1
  mut done = false
  while i < n and not done
    while i < n and is_ws(s, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    if i < n
      let start = i
      while i < n and not is_ws(s, i)
        i = i + 1
      end
      let stop = i
      let tok = string.substring(s, start, stop)
      if tok == target
        result = start
        done = true
      end
    end
  end
  result
end

let s = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(s)
mut best_token = ""
mut best_count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  while i < n and is_ws(s, i)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if i < n
    let start = i
    while i < n and not is_ws(s, i)
      i = i + 1
    end
    let stop = i
    let token = string.substring(s, start, stop)
    if first_pos(s, token) == start
      let c = count_token(s, token)
      if c > best_count
        best_count = c
        best_token = token
      end
    end
  end
end
print("top=#{best_token}=#{best_count}")
